zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury於大約1187年出生在英國維爾爾阿姆斯波利時，她的父親William FitzPatrick34歲，母親Aliénor de   Vitre30歲。她與William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和11個女兒的父母。她去世於1261年8月24日在英國維爾爾其朋納姆享年75歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾拉可可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury于大约1187年出生在英国維爾爾阿姆斯波利时，她的父亲William FitzPatrick34岁，母亲Aliénor de   Vitre30岁。她与William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和11个女儿的父母。她去世于1261年8月24日在英国維爾爾其朋納姆享年75岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾拉可可。

nameMeanings.name: FitzPatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Declan, Ronan, Liam, Seamus, Sinead, Siobhan, Aileen, Bridie, Brigid, Conan.

Irish: occasionally this may be a genuine Anglo-Norman French patronymic meaning ‘son of Patrick ’, but more often it has been adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Pádraig, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Patrick’ (see Kilpatrick ).

variants.name: Patrick
meanings: Irish, Scottish, and English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French, Middle English, and Older Scots personal name Patrick (Old Irish Patraicc), derived from Latin Patricius ‘son of a noble father, member of the patrician class’. This was the name of a Christian saint, a 5th-century Romano-Briton who became the apostle and patron saint of Ireland, and it was largely as a result of his fame that the personal name was so popular from the Middle Ages onward. In Ireland the surname is usually Scottish in origin, from Scottish settlers in Ulster in the 17th century. See also Peden and McPadden , derived from pet forms of Old Irish Patraicc.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Scottish and Irish Gaelic Mac Phádraig ‘son of Patrick’.

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently an altered form of Hilda , not in use before the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury was born about 1187, in Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, William FitzPatrick, was 34 and her mother, Aliénor de   Vitre, was 30. She married William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 11 daughters. She died on 24 August 1261, in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Lacock, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury est née environ 1187, à Amesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William FitzPatrick, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Aliénor de   Vitre, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 11 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1261, à Chippenham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Lacock, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury um 1187 in Amesbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzPatrick 34 und ihre Mutter Aliénor de   Vitre 30. Sie hat in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. August 1261 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Lacock, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury è nata il circa 1187 nel Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, William FitzPatrick, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Aliénor de   Vitre, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 11 figlie. Morì il 24 agosto 1261, nel Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Lacock, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyが約1187年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアエイメスブリーで生まれた時，父William FitzPatrickは34歳，母Aliénor de   Vitreは30歳であった。イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでWilliam Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼女は1261年8月24日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハムで75歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアラコックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(이)가 대략 1187년 영국 윌츠히르 아메스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzPatrick(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aliénor de   Vitre(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 8월 24일 영국 윌츠히르 치펜함에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 라콕에 묻혔다.

mn.Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: Wycombe, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Amesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzPatrick, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Aliénor de   Vitre, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 11 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1261, em Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury родилась около 1187 г. в местности амесбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzPatrick было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Aliénor de   Vitre, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Она умерла 24 августа 1261 г. в местности чиппенам, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности лакокк, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury nació aproximadamente 1187, en Amesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzPatrick, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Aliénor de   Vitre, tenía 30 años. Se casó con William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1261, en Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
